io.vertigo.core.lang.ListBuilder

Description
io.vertigo.core.lang
 

  • Uses of ListBuilder in io.vertigo.core.lang

    Methods in io.vertigo.core.lang that return ListBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ListBuilder<X>
    ListBuilder.add(X value)
    Adds a required element to the list.
    ListBuilder<X>
    ListBuilder.addAll(Collection<? extends X> values)
    Adds all elements from a collection.
    ListBuilder<X>
    ListBuilder.sort(Comparator<? super X> comparator)
    Sets list sorting comparator.
    ListBuilder<X>
    ListBuilder.unmodifiable()
    Makes the resulting list unmodifiable.
